name: Anhui Liuguo Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Liuguo Chemical Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells fertilizers in China and internationally. The company offers phosphorus compound fertilizers, fine phosphorus chemicals, synthetic ammonia, soil conditioner, and methanol products. It sells its products under the Shi Da Zhuang, Six Kingdoms, Huai Hai, six Swiss, Six Star, six fat baby, LANDGREEN, and other trademarks. The company is based in Tongling, China.
